passive.name: Umbra Blades
passive.description:
Every few seconds, Nocturne's next attack strikes surrounding enemies for bonus physical damage and heals himself. 

Nocturne's basic attacks reduce this cooldown.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, {{cis|Nocturne}} next basic attack causes him to slash in a circle that deals {{as|'''increased''' physical damage}} to the target and nearby enemies, {{tip|heal|healing}} him for each enemy hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Basic attacks {{sti|cdr|reduce}} ''Umbra Blade's'' cooldown, increased against {{tip|monsters}} and {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Nocturne''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] to slash in a circle, dealing {{as|120% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to the target and nearby enemies and {{tip|healing}} himself for {{pp|13 to 30}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}} per enemy hit. Against {{tip|minions}}, ''Umbra Blade's'' damage to secondary targets and healing are reduced by 50% and it applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects{{bug|2}} to all targets at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Umbra Blades'' can {{tip|critically strike}} against the primary target, modifying the {{as|physical damage}} dealt to{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Nocturne|crit_base}}|100|mod=1.1}} AD}}.|110% of the {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} of his basic attacks.}}
wiki_detail.description3: Basic attacks reduce ''Umbra Blades' '' {{sti|cooldown}} by 1 second, increased to 3 against enemy {{tip|champions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The primary target of the enhanced attack takes {{tip|basic damage}} while the secondary targets of the slash are dealt {{tip|default damage}}. * The enhanced attack will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s (only to main target) and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal. ** The critical strike damage of the attack is notably unusual.{{bug|2}} It stems from a time where critical strikes by default did {{as|200% AD}} damage, which meant that 110% of it equaled {{as|220% AD}}, equal to a more standard ''Umbral Blades' ''bonus damage of {{as|20% AD}} added to the critical damage. This also causes bonus critial damage such as {{iis|Infinity Edge}} passive to be 10% stronger on the attack.
Now, the formula reduces the expected critical damage slightly by {{as|{{fd|-2.5}}% AD}}, which is 10% of the reduction in base critical damage from [[Patch (League of Legends)/Season_Eleven#Pre-Season_Eleven|Pre-Season 11]]. * The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s. ** Basic attacks against them will still grant the cooldown reduction. * Parry effects will only block the damage dealt to the primary target.

Q.name: Duskbringer
Q.description: Nocturne throws a shadow blade that deals damage, leaves a Dusk Trail, and causes champions to leave a Dusk Trail. While on the trail, Nocturne can move through units and has increased Move Speed and Attack Damage.
Q.tooltip:
Nocturne throws a shadow blade, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and leaving a dusk trail for {{ e3 }} seconds. Enemy champions hit also leave a trail. 

While on the trail, Nocturne is Ghosted and gains {{ movespeed }}% Move Speed and {{ bonustrailad }} Attack Damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nocturne}} casts out a shadow blade in the target direction that leaves a ''Dusk Trail'' in its wake, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. Enemy {{tip|champions}} hit will leave a ''Dusk Trail'' in their wake for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While on the ''Dusk Trail'', Nocturne is {{tip|ghosted}} and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} and {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' casts out a shadow blade in the target direction that leaves a ''Dusk Trail'' in its wake, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. Enemy {{tip|champions}} and large {{tip|monsters}} hit will leave a ''Dusk Trail'' behind while moving. ''Dusk Trails'' last 5 seconds and will slowly disappear afterwards.
wiki_detail.description2: While on the ''Dusk Trail'', '''Nocturne''' is {{tip|ghosted}} and gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus total''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Attack Damage|{{ap|15 to 55}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|15 to 35}}%}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Duskbringer'' checks for and hits targets 25 units outside of the missile's maximum range.
* ''Duskbringer's'' damage is not increased by the {{as|'''bonus''' AD}} gained from its trail, meaning that casting it again while on the trail from the last cast will not result in higher damage.
** It is observed from seasons ago that this is intentionally hard-coded into the ability to avoid the projectile increasing its own damage. This feature is somewhat deprecated as it also limits chain-casting ''Duskbringer''.
* ''Duskbringer's Dusk Trail'' will expose the path of affected units until its duration ends. It is a form of {{tip|obscured vision}}; the trail indirectly reveals the location of enemy units even in the fog of war, including those shrouded by {{tip|stealth}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the damage and also prevents the ''Dusk Trail'' from following the target.
* The formed ''Dusk Trail'' does not disappear if ''Duskbringer'' is intercepted by {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} or {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}}.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* The {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} {{tip|stacks multiplicatively}} with other sources of movement speed boosts.

W.name: Shroud of Darkness
W.description: Nocturne empowers his blades, passively gaining Attack Speed. Activating Shroud of Darkness allows Nocturne to fade into the shadows, creating a magical barrier which blocks a single enemy ability and doubles his passive Attack Speed if successful.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Nocturne gains {{ e1 }}% Attack Speed.

Active: Nocturne creates a shadow barrier for 1.5 seconds that blocks the next enemy Ability. If an Ability is blocked, this Ability's passive effect is increased to {{ e1 }}% Attack Speed for {{ e4 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' gains a brief {{tip|spell shield}}. If it blocks an ability, the {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} is doubled for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|30 to 50}}%|Enhanced Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|30*2 to 50*2}}%}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' gains a {{tip|spell shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. Upon successfully blocking a hostile effect, ''Shroud of Darkness' ''{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} is doubled for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.spelleffects:
|notes        = 
* If ''Shroud of Darkness'' is active when '''Nocturne''' re-casts ''{{ai|Paranoia|Nocturne}}'' to dash to a target, its duration is refreshed every {{fd|0.25 seconds}} during the dash.

E.name: Unspeakable Horror
E.description: Nocturne plants a nightmare into his target's mind, dealing damage each second and applying fear to the target if they do not get out of range by the end of the duration.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Nocturne gains {{ tooltipfearms*100 }}% Move Speed toward Feared enemies.

Active: Nocturne plants a nightmare tether into his target, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage over {{ e3 }} seconds. If the tether remains unbroken, the target is Feared for {{ e2 }} second(s).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Nocturne}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while moving towards {{tip|fear|feared}} targets.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' torments the target, forming a {{tip|tether}} that continually deals {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If the tether is not broken after a short time, the target is briefly {{tip|fear|feared}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Nocturne''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|90% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing nearby {{tip|fear|feared}} targets.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' torments the target, forming a {{tip|tether}} between himself and the target for 2 seconds, during which the target takes {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds over the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 260}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|80/4 to 260/4}} {{as|(+ {{ap|100/4}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, the target is {{tip|fear|feared}} for a duration while being {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 90%.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Feared enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 180° total angle within '''Nocturne's''' facing direction will trigger ''Unspeakable Horror's'' passive.
** The movement speed buff is granted even while '''Nocturne''' is standing still.
** '''Nocturne''' does not need to have sight of fleeing targets to gain movement speed towards them.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the tether's application but not the damage and aftereffects of one already applied.

R.name: Paranoia
R.description: Nocturne reduces the sight radius of all enemy champions and removes their ally vision in the process. He can then launch himself at a nearby enemy champion.
R.tooltip: Nocturne darkens the map, reducing the sight radius of all enemy champions and removing their vision of allies for {{ paranoiaduration }} seconds. Nocturne can Recast this Ability during the duration to launch himself at an enemy champion dealing {{ damage }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nocturne}} terrorizes all enemy champions, {{tip|nearsight|nearsighting}} them for a few seconds. He can recast ''Paranoia'' during this time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Nocturne''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target enemy champion, dealing {{as|physical damage}} upon arrival.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|displacement immunity|nolink=true}}:}} The dash cannot be deterred by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nocturne''' terrorizes all enemy champions, {{tip|nearsight|nearsighting}} them for 6 seconds. He can recast ''Paranoia'' for the same duration after {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Nocturne''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target enemy champion, dealing {{as|physical damage}} upon arrival.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Nocturne''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.''
wiki_detail.custominfo: {{tt|300|Reduces enemy champions' sight radius to 1,050 units}}
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|{{ap|140 to 90}}|Starts after recast times out or is used}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Nocturne''' will track the target if they change locations.
** He will dash to the target's previous location without dealing damage if the target is too far away or moves beyond {{ap|3500|4250|5000}} (based on ''Paranoia's'' rank) units.
* Enemy players affected by ''Paranoia's'' {{tip|nearsight}} cannot interact with the allied portrait icons on the HUD.
* ''Paranoia's'' {{tip|nearsight}} will apply to enemy champions that are {{tip|untargetable}} or are dead, and will persist through {{tip|death}}.
* '''Nocturne''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]], [[summoner spell|summoner spells]] (excluding {{si|Hexflash}}), or [[active ability items|item actives]] during flight.
** Using a {{tip|dash}} or {{tip|blink}} ability will interrupt the flight.
** The flight will also be interrupted if '''Nocturne''' is affected by a {{ui|Blast Cone}} triggered by an allied champion.{{bug|1}}<!-- Has only been tested with the chemtech map's blast cones -->
* ''Paranoia'' cannot be recast while {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}.
* ''Paranoia's'' {{tip|nearsight}} does not apply to {{tip|clone|clones}}.
* [[summoner|Players']] screens will turn a different color when ''Paranoia'' is cast, based on their perspective: blue for allies and red for enemies.
* A [[spell indicator]] telegraphed to '''Nocturne''' and his allies will be placed on all enemy {{tip|champion|champions}} within range of ''Paranoia's'' recast while the ability is active. ''The following images display the indicator for the default [[skin]]:''
[[File:Nocturne_Original_Paranoia_Indicator_Red.png|thumb|left|A glowing '''{{color|#8b0000|red silhouette}}''' of '''Nocturne's''' blades indicates an enemy champion can be targeted by ''Paranoia's'' recast.]]
[[File:Nocturne Original Paranoia Indicator.png|thumb|left|A glowing '''{{color|#32CD32|green silhouette}}''' of '''Nocturne's''' blades signifies an enemy champion has been targeted by ''Paranoia's'' recast.]]
_comments: Has only been tested with the chemtech map's blast cones
